pasted-movie.png
Multiple rounds of tool calling to interact with the world
Multi-agent systems use multiple LLMs with developer-defined personas to give each agent a certain \"expertise\"
These roles are defined by a human expert pre-hoc
These manually defined multi-agent systems are powerful, but generalize across domains poorly
Multi-Agent Systems
Figure from MetaGPT (Hong et al., 2024)
pasted-movie.png
How can we design multi-agent systems to decompose and delegate complex tasks without human-defined graphs?
Multiple rounds of tool calling to interact with the world
Multi-agent systems use multiple LLMs with developer-defined personas to give each agent a certain \"expertise\"
These roles are defined by a human expert pre-hoc
These manually defined multi-agent systems are powerful, but generalize across domains poorly
